messages.content: # Want to play on FDR? Follow this guide!

## How to get FDR.
> FDR is a paid map available on Patreon, it requires the second (10$) subscription
> This can be purchased here - https://www.patreon.com/andrepradiktha

## How to install FDR.
> To install the map, you must scroll all the way down and start with the first release of the map, make sure to install manually (<#1457475437809631416>) then follow the same process with each update in the order they were posted
## How to play FDR.
> The only FDR server currently offered on No Hesi is in <#1159258188974141501>
